name: MOBERG PHARMA AB
summary: Moberg Pharma AB develops and commercializes over-the-counter (OTC) pharmaceuticals and medical devices with a focus on skin and nail care products. The company's portfolio includes brands like Kerasal, Kerasal Nail, and New Skin, which are sold in pharmacies and online retailers primarily in North America and Europe. Moberg Pharma is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
